name: Face Pull
setup: Set cable pulley at upper-chest height
Grip with palms facing each other, step back for tension
execution: Pull rope toward your face, separating ends
External rotate shoulders (hands move back, knuckles go back)
Squeeze rear delts and upper back at peak
common_mistakes: Pulling to chin instead of eyes/forehead
Not separating the rope at the end
cues: Shoulder health — do these every session!
recommendation: Do 3-4 sets of 15-20 at least 3x/week for shoulder health
